emails.subject: Re: 1/2/01 Payment
emails.body: Jane, Southwest Gas shorted ENA $16,386.19 for liquidated damages they claim occurred in November (see email below). I have not received the support from SWG but have asked them to fax me a copy. How would you like me to handle? Laurie Forwarded by Laurie Ellis/NA/Enron on 01/03/2001 09:44 AM "Nancy Frazier" <Nancy.Frazier@groupwise.swgas.com> on 01/03/2001 09:13:03 AM

emails.subject: Re: 1/2/01 Payment
emails.body: Re: 1/2/01 Payment Thank you for advising me of this issue. When you get back-up please forward to Patti Sullivan. We are going to work on charging them some penalties for a differnet month to help offset this.
